title: Web Development
shortDesc: Custom websites built with modern technologies like React and Next.js for high performance and scalability.
description: We create modern, fast, secure, and responsive websites tailored to your business goals. Our web development solutions focus on user experience, SEO optimization, performance, and scalability to help your business grow online.

process.title: Requirement Analysis
process.desc: Understanding your business goals and website requirements.

process.title: UI/UX Planning
process.desc: Creating modern layouts and user-friendly designs.

process.title: Development
process.desc: Building scalable frontend and backend systems.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.answer: Usually between 7 to 30 days depending on project complexity.

faq.question: Will my website be mobile responsive?
faq.answer: Yes, all websites are fully responsive for mobile, tablet, and desktop.

title: Mobile App Development
shortDesc: Android & iOS apps with smooth UI/UX and powerful backend systems.
description: We develop high-performance mobile applications for Android and iOS platforms with intuitive user interfaces and scalable backend systems.

process.title: Deployment
process.desc: Publishing apps on Play Store & App Store.

faq.question: Do you develop both Android and iOS apps?
faq.answer: Yes, we build apps for both platforms.

title: UI/UX Design
shortDesc: Creative and user-focused design to improve engagement and user experience.
description: Our UI/UX design services focus on creating visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces that improve customer engagement and satisfaction.

process.title: Research
process.desc: Understanding target audience and business goals.

faq.question: Which tools do you use for design?
faq.answer: We use Figma, Adobe XD, Photoshop, and Illustrator.

title: SEO Optimization
shortDesc: Boost your Google ranking and increase organic traffic with proven SEO strategies.
description: Our SEO services help businesses rank higher on Google, increase website visibility, and drive targeted organic traffic.

faq.question: How long does SEO take?
faq.answer: SEO usually takes 3 to 6 months for noticeable results.

title: Cloud Solutions
shortDesc: Secure, scalable cloud infrastructure using AWS, Google Cloud & Azure.
description: We provide secure and scalable cloud infrastructure solutions to improve business performance, flexibility, and data security.

faq.question: Which cloud platforms do you support?
faq.answer: We support AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.

title: E-Commerce Development
shortDesc: Build powerful online stores with Shopify, WooCommerce & custom solutions.
description: We develop secure, scalable, and user-friendly e-commerce websites that help businesses sell products online effectively.

process.title: Design & Development
process.desc: Building attractive and responsive store layouts.

process.title: Launch
process.desc: Testing and launching the online store.

faq.question: Can you integrate payment gateways?
faq.answer: Yes, we integrate Razorpay, Stripe, PayPal and more.
